stat.title: Reached on Error Merchants
stat.subtitle: Plate appearances where the batter reached on a fielding error.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski reached on error · Bot 2
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Jared Young. Dominic Smith to 2nd.
